chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 5304 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For directions 22.08.2023 Mr. Illahi Bux Jamali, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Pervaiz Ahmed, Executive Engineer, Buildings Division, Naushahro Feroze >>>>>>>...<<<<<<< Petitioner, who is resident of Village Sher Muhammad Jamali, has filed this petition seeking directions to the respondents to complete construction work of medical dispensary situated in his village. Pervaiz Ahmed, Executive Engineer, Buildings Division, Naushahro Feroze has appeared and filed statement along with certain documents and submits that construction work of the dispensary has been stopped for want of funds for which letter has been written to Finance Department for releasing an amount of Rs.3.980 million. As soon as the amount is released construction would be completed within three months thereafter. This petition is, therefore, accordingly disposed of. Learned AAG Sindh, however, coordinate with Finance Department to ensure that the funds are released to the Executive Engineer, Buildings Division, Naushahro Feroze for further construction of the dispensary within a reasonable time not later than two months. Office is direct to provide copy of this order to learned AAG Sindh for compliance. Judge Judge ARBROHI
